ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sector (e.g., industry, services) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sector */,
  "sector_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search and categorization */,
  "sector_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sector (e.g., number of companies, employees) */,
  "sector_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the sector */,
  "sector_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the sector data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "sector1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first sector in the correlation */,
  "sector2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second sector in the correlation */,
  "correlation_value" REAL /* Correlation value between the two sectors */,
  "correlation_date" TEXT /* Date when the correlation was calculated */,
  "correlation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the correlation (e.g., Pearson, Spearman) */,
  "correlation_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the correlation */,
  "correlation_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the correlation data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_sector1_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector1_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_sector2_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector2_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search and categorization */,
  "category_size" INTEGER /* Number of sectors in the category */,
  "category_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the category */,
  "category_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the category data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., description, keywords) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "metadata_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created or updated */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., descriptive, technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_metadata_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the correlation the visualization represents */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., heatmap, network diagram) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Visualization data (e.g., image file, graph data) */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_source" TEXT /* Source of the visualization data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created or updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_correlation_id FOREIGN KEY ("correlation_id") REFERENCES correlations ("correlation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sector data */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sector data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the performance data belongs to */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance data */,
  "performance_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "performance_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure performance (e.g., revenue, profit) */,
  "performance_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the performance value is measured (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_performance_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the trend data belongs to */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend data */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend data */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "trend_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure trends (e.g., moving average, exponential smoothing) */,
  "trend_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the trend value is measured (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_trends_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the news article is related to */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "news_source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "news_author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "news_tags" TEXT /* Tags for easy categorization (e.g., economic, political) */,
  "news_read_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the news article has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_news_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)
